researchx.description: ResearchX MCP Server — AI Research Operating System

claudeDesktop.title: Install ResearchX in Claude Desktop
steps: Open Claude Desktop → Settings → Developer → MCP Servers
Or install from npm: npx researchx-mcp

cline.title: Install ResearchX in Cline / Roo Code
steps: Add new server with: python researchx_mcp_server.py
Or use the MCP config file in your project

continue.title: Install ResearchX in Continue.dev
steps: Add ResearchX to the mcpServers section
